# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this repository, please report it responsibly.

Preferred reporting options:

- Open a GitHub security advisory for this repository, or
- Open a private issue titled `SECURITY: <brief summary>` and request that maintainers keep it confidential.

Do not disclose the vulnerability publicly until it has been resolved.

## What to include

When reporting a vulnerability, include as much detail as possible:

- A clear description of the issue
- Affected component(s) or page(s)
- Steps to reproduce the problem
- Expected behavior vs actual behavior
- Any logs, screenshots, or example code
- Suggested mitigation if available

## Response timeline

We aim to acknowledge reports within 1 business day and provide an update as soon as possible. Remediation timelines will depend on severity and available information.

## Scope

This policy applies to all code and content in this repository, including the portfolio frontend, documentation, and website assets.
